summary: First full E2E test of FILINEX. Backend: 22/22 pytest tests passed (health, admin auth/JWT, leads CRUD + admin gating + stats, newsletter idempotent + admin gating, blog list/detail/category-filter/404/admin-gating, public stats). Frontend: home loads with all sections (hero/services/process/why/testimonials/tech-wall/final-cta/footer), cookie banner accept stores localStorage 'filinex_cookie_consent'='accepted', WhatsApp float visible, all 5 nav links route correctly, hero CTA 'Start a Project' navigates to /contact via window.location, contact form submits → 'Sent ✓', estimator price range updates dynamically based on chip selections + submit shows 'Estimate sent' toast, newsletter footer submit works, blog lists 5 seeded posts (2 featured + 3 regular) and detail page /blog/the-rise-of-ai-native-saas renders, 404 page renders for /random-invalid, admin login with seeded credentials succeeds, JWT stored in localStorage as 'filinex_admin_token', dashboard shows stats + leads, status filter works, search filter works, status update (PATCH /api/leads/{id}) reflects in UI, delete (DELETE /api/leads/{id}) removes from list. No console errors detected.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: `logger` is referenced inside `seed_data` startup hook (line 386) but the `logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)` definition appears later (line 399). Works at runtime because startup runs after module is fully loaded, but the ordering is brittle — move logger init to the top of the file for clarity.

Note: The review request mentioned blog slug 'innovation-hub-225' (which is actually the preview subdomain, not a slug). Actual seeded slugs are 'the-rise-of-ai-native-saas', 'building-cinematic-product-launches', 'web3-without-the-hype', 'the-enterprise-automation-stack', 'from-zero-to-product-six-week-sprint'. Detail route /blog/the-rise-of-ai-native-saas works.

Admin lead card uses `data-testid=admin-lead-{id}` on a <button> AND the inner delete icon uses `data-testid=admin-lead-delete`. Selectors like `[data-testid^='admin-lead-']` also match the delete button — main agent may want to rename delete to `admin-delete-lead` to avoid testid prefix collision.
Server.py is 405 lines — acceptable but approaching the recommended 700-line split threshold if more features are added.
seed_data_creation: Tests created several TEST_-prefixed leads via /api/leads (some cleaned up via DELETE in lifecycle test). A few TEST_E2E leads remain in DB from UI flow tests — harmless test data, prefixed for easy cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py uses BASE_URL from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env. Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. Important selectors for UI: contact form fields use data-testid='contact-name|email|phone|company|country|message', 'contact-submit'. Estimator chips: 'estimator-type-{id}', 'estimator-feat-{id}', 'estimator-complex-{id}', 'estimator-time-{id}'. Admin lead cards use 'admin-lead-{id}' on button (so :not([data-testid=admin-lead-delete]) when counting). All required testids exist and work.
rca of the issue: No bugs found — first iteration passed cleanly across backend and frontend.
